sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dict (id INT PRIMARY KEY, key_name VARCHAR(50), value_num INT);
INSERT INTO test_dict (id, key_name, value_num) VALUES (1, 'a', 100), (2, 'b', NULL), (3, 'c', -50);
SELECT key_name, value_num FROM test_dict WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_dict WHERE value_num IS NULL);
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (num_col DECIMAL(10,2), str_col VARCHAR(100), mixed_col ANY);
INSERT INTO edge_cases (num_col, str_col, mixed_col) VALUES (100.50, 'test', 1), (NULL, 'NULL case', 'non-numeric'), (MAX(1,2), '', '');
SELECT * FROM edge_cases WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM edge_cases WHERE str_col = '' AND num_col > (SELECT MAX(num_col) FROM edge_cases) / 2);
SELECT str_col, mixed_col FROM edge_cases WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM edge_cases WHERE num_col BETWEEN -100 AND 100) GROUP BY str_col HAVING COUNT(mixed_col) > 1;
CREATE TABLE test_conditions (val_a INT, val_b INT, complex_key VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_conditions (val_a, val_b, complex_key) VALUES (NULL, 10, 'A'), (15, NULL, 'B'), (5, 5, 'C');
SELECT complex_key, COUNT(*) as occurrences FROM test_conditions GROUP BY complex_key HAVING occurrences > 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_conditions WHERE val_a IS NOT NULL AND val_b IS NOT NULL);
